events.text: Substitution, Panama. José Fajardo replaces Tomás Rodríguez.
José Fajardo (Panama) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Jarell Quansah (England) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal! Panama 0, England 1. Jude Bellingham (England) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Bukayo Saka with a cross following a corner.
Substitution, England. Djed Spence replaces Jarell Quansah.
Substitution, England. Noni Madueke replaces Bukayo Saka.
Goal! Panama 0, England 2. Harry Kane (England) header from the centre of the box to the top left corner. Assisted by Jude Bellingham with a cross.
Substitution, Panama. Ismael Díaz replaces Yoel Bárcenas.
Substitution, England. Eberechi Eze replaces Jude Bellingham.
Substitution, Panama. Azarías Londoño replaces José Luis Rodríguez.
Andrés Andrade (Panama) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, England. Jordan Henderson replaces Elliot Anderson.
Substitution, England. Ollie Watkins replaces Harry Kane.
Substitution, Panama. Alberto Quintero replaces Carlos Harvey.
Substitution, Panama. Éric Davis replaces Jorge Gutiérrez.
